brand.name: Sehatyaab Fresh Batch
brand.tagline_master: Rural roots. Modern nourishment. Made fresh after order.
brand.tagline_short: Fresh organic bites, made to order.
brand.promise: Prepared fresh after confirmed order. Delivered in 3–5 days.

products.tagline: Every bite counts. Make them count.
products.short_description: High-density whole-food protein bites for gym users and active professionals. No powders. No fillers.
products.audience: Gym users, active professionals, protein-conscious buyers
products.ingredients: Cashews, Almonds, Pistachios, Pumpkin Seeds, Sunflower Seeds, Walnuts
products.highlights: Protein-forward | Clean energy | Made to order | Whole-food only
products.whatsapp_message: Hi Sehatyaab! I want to order Daily Protein Bites (Fuel). Please share size options and pricing.
products.packaging_front: Dark charcoal background | Lime green accents | Bold macro grid
products.packaging_back: 12 whole-food ingredients | No preservatives | Made to order
products.brochure_panel: For the gym user who refuses to compromise on what goes in their body.
